description: A new Health Information Officer has joined Kenema District Health Management Team and requires DHIS2 system access. Create an active user account at http://localhost:8080 (admin/district) for Fatmata Koroma (Username: fatmata.koroma, Email: fatmata.koroma@mohsl.gov.sl, Password: District2024!). The account must be assigned an appropriate data entry user role, with data capture organisation units set to Kenema district and data view organisation units set to Sierra Leone.
